pr.title: Record: Loqui Auris — 10L + SWA + Standard TTT (val_bpb=1.1100)

output.summary: 10-layer GQA transformer with SmearGate/BigramHash, SWA averaging, and standard AdamW TTT applied after quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard AdamW TTT fine-tunes the quantized weights directly on the validation data before evaluation.
techniques: 10-layer GQA stack with SmearGate, BigramHash, and U-Net skips
SWA over 29 checkpoints before artifact compression
Standard AdamW test-time training on validation data
